case_summary: The complainant, a married woman, was subjected to cruelty and harassment by her husband and in-laws for dowry. She was beaten, thrown out of the house, and forced to return to her parents' home. She has filed a complaint against her husband and in-laws.

sections.title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
sections.description: Whoever, being the husband or relative of husband of a woman, subjects such woman to cruelty shall be punished...

sections.title: Theft
sections.description: Whoever, intending to take dishonestly any movable property out of the possession of any person without that person's consent, moves that property in order to take it, shall be punished...

special_laws.act_name: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act 2005
special_laws.action: File for protection order. Inform victim of rights. Report to DV Magistrate.

evidence_checklist: Seize mobile phone - extract call records, WhatsApp messages
Photograph all visible injuries on victim
Record witness statements under BNSS Sec 180
io_warnings: MANDATORY: Do not refuse FIR - Lalita Kumari SC judgment applies
MANDATORY: Arrest must follow D.K. Basu SC guidelines
